name: Matthew the Fennec
description:
Biography:

Matthew was born on Planet Mobius in July 31st 3208, he started a group along with his best friend Michael the Bat, Linda the Tenrec and Jackie the Quoll to fight for freedom against Doctor Stetson and his robots.

He met a Robot Lion named Lucky in Doctor Stetsons lab and rescued her and made her join the Freedom Fighters of Crystal Lake.

Matthew went to an island south from Crystal Lake Forest for a vacation, he then notices a Yellow Mobian fox in a dress with 3 tails following him and she got captured by Iron Plated Matthew, Matthew the Fennec chased after him and later he rescued Scarlett and he figured it was the work of Doctor Stetson then, after defeating Stetson and freeing the Island he asked Scarlett to join him in the effort of defeating Doctor Stetson. He went on a Mission with Luckina to get all 10 of the Moonstones, but the Gang that consistent of Johnny Rabbit, Ruby the fox and Anthrax the cat they stole some of the moonstones and ran off after defeating them and Matthew then saw a demonic fennec named Yozora they fought each other but after both defeating Doctor. Stetson they both decided to join forces with each other and fought against him.
